title: Cox Proportional Hazards: The Workhorse of Survival Analysis
summary: Survival analysis starts with a question: how long until an event happens? A patient relapses, a customer churns, a borrower defaults on a loan, a prisoner is rearrested. Parametric models answer by assuming a shape for the hazard — Weibull, log-logistic, exponential — and estimating its parameters.
